extortion.description: In 1951, the young telecommunications engineer from Salamanca, Antonio Peral, founded Amper Radio, the origin of today’s Amper. In the 1960s, Amper began mass-producing radio and intercom devices and became one of the world’s leading companies in its speciality. Antonio Peral’s entrepreneurial spirit has been with us throughout our long history, helping the company to overcome difficulties and seize opportunities.SITE: www.grupoamper.com Address : C/ Virgilio,2 (Edif. 4). Ciudad de la Imagen, CP.28223, Pozuelo de Alarcón, Madrid, EspañaALL DATA SIZE: ≈650gb 1. R&D data, Projects 2. Users, Employees personal data 3. Scans 4. Company data: HR, Payroll, Finance… & etc…
